---
applyTo: "**"
description: "Bun as the only package manager and runtime"
---

# Bun should be used

    - as a runtime,
    - for package management.

## Replaceing Node

    - Use `#context7` tools for up to date bun docs.
    - If you see `nodejs` use in codebase refer to up to date bun docs and if possible replace this use with bun
